raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Senate passed Senate Resolution 36, reaffirming California's commitment to the 2015 Paris Climate Agreement.",
    "California aims to reverse climate change rather than merely slow it down.",
    "Greenhouse gas levels in the atmosphere directly impact the long-term average temperature of the Earth.",
    "The recent federal withdrawal from the Paris Agreement will not change the basic fact of rising greenhouse gas levels in the atmosphere.",
    "The Paris Agreement commits nearly every nation to limiting global temperature rise to well below 2°C above pre-industrial levels.",
    "The California State Senate supports the goal of restoring the atmosphere to safe, pre-industrial levels of greenhouse gas concentrations.",
    "California's core policy priorities include climate restoration, net-zero, and net-negative carbon emissions.",
    "Senator Cortese led the adoption of the nation’s first Climate Restoration Emergency Resolution.",
    "SB 429 establishes the nation’s first publicly available wildfire risk model.",
    "SB 653 promotes environmentally sensitive vegetation management practices.",
    "SB 30 prevents the redeployment of decommissioned diesel trains in California."
  ]
}
```
